name: Valencia | Choose 1 card.
description:
4 cards, 3 cards that will kill you, 1 that will make you live.

Card number 1: torn apart: she will tear you apart limb by limb.

Card 2: eaten: she will swallow you whole like a food.

Card 3: snake: a snake will bite you and you'll die of poison.

Card 4th: heart: she will let you live.
creator: _.RetroSoul_.
